NKJV.1: To the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David. To bring to remembrance. Make haste, O God, to deliver me! Make haste to help me, O LORD!
NKJV.2: Let them be ashamed and confounded Who seek my life; Let them be turned back and confused Who desire my hurt.
NKJV.3: Let them be turned back because of their shame, Who say, “Aha, aha!”
NKJV.4: Let all those who seek You rejoice and be glad in You; And let those who love Your salvation say continually, “Let God be magnified!”
NKJV.5: But I am poor and needy; Make haste to me, O God! You are my help and my deliverer; O LORD, do not delay.

KJV.1: To the chief Musician<S>5329</S>, A Psalm of David<S>1732</S>, to bring to remembrance<S>2142</S>. Make haste, O God<S>430</S>, to deliver<S>5337</S> me; make haste<S>2363</S> to help<S>5833</S> me, O LORD<S>3068</S>. <sup>to help: Heb. to my help</sup>
KJV.2: Let them be ashamed<S>954</S> and confounded<S>2659</S> that seek<S>1245</S> after my soul<S>5315</S>: let them be turned<S>5472</S> backward<S>268</S>, and put to confusion<S>3637</S>, that desire<S>2655</S> my hurt<S>7451</S>.
KJV.3: Let them be turned back<S>7725</S> for a reward<S>6118</S> of their shame<S>1322</S> that say<S>559</S>, Aha<S>1889</S>, aha<S>1889</S>.
KJV.4: Let all those that seek<S>1245</S> thee rejoice<S>7797</S> and be glad<S>8055</S> in thee: and let such as love<S>157</S> thy salvation<S>3444</S> say<S>559</S> continually<S>8548</S>, Let God<S>430</S> be magnified<S>1431</S>.
KJV.5: But I am poor<S>6041</S> and needy<S>34</S>: make haste<S>2363</S> unto me, O God<S>430</S>: thou art my help<S>5828</S> and my deliverer<S>6403</S>; O LORD<S>3068</S>, make no tarrying<S>309</S>.

ESV.1: Make haste, O God, to deliver me! O LORD, make haste to help me!
ESV.2: Let them be put to shame and confusion who seek my life! Let them be turned back and brought to dishonor who delight in my hurt!
ESV.3: Let them turn back because of their shame who say, “Aha, Aha!”
ESV.4: May all who seek you rejoice and be glad in you! May those who love your salvation say evermore, “God is great!”
ESV.5: But I am poor and needy; hasten to me, O God! You are my help and my deliverer; O LORD, do not delay!

NASB.1: For the choir director. [A Psalm] of David; for a memorial. O God, [hasten] to deliver me; O LORD, hasten to my help!
NASB.2: Let those be ashamed and humiliated Who seek my life; Let those be turned back and dishonored Who delight in my hurt.
NASB.3: Let those be turned back because of their shame Who say, 'Aha, aha!'
NASB.4: Let all who seek You rejoice and be glad in You; And let those who love Your salvation say continually, 'Let God be magnified.'
NASB.5: But I am afflicted and needy; Hasten to me, O God! You are my help and my deliverer; O LORD, do not delay.

NLT.1:
Please, God, rescue me!
Come quickly, LORD, and help me.
NLT.2:
May those who try to kill me
be humiliated and put to shame.
May those who take delight in my trouble
be turned back in disgrace.
NLT.3:
Let them be horrified by their shame,
for they said, “Aha! We’ve got him now!”
NLT.4:
But may all who search for you
be filled with joy and gladness in you.
May those who love your salvation
repeatedly shout, “God is great!”
NLT.5:
But as for me, I am poor and needy;
please hurry to my aid, O God.
You are my helper and my savior;
O LORD, do not delay.

WEB.1: For the Chief Musician. By David. A reminder. Hurry, God, to deliver me. Come quickly to help me, Yahweh.
WEB.2: Let them be disappointed and confounded who seek my soul. Let those who desire my ruin be turned back in disgrace.
WEB.3: Let them be turned because of their shame Who say, “Aha! Aha!”
WEB.4: Let all those who seek you rejoice and be glad in you. Let those who love your salvation continually say, “Let God be exalted!”
WEB.5: But I am poor and needy. Come to me quickly, God. You are my help and my deliverer. Yahweh, don’t delay.

CSB17.1:
For the choir director. Of David. To bring remembrance. ⓐ [1] God, hurry to rescue me.
LORD, hurry to help me! ⓑ
CSB17.2:
Let those who seek to kill me
be disgraced and confounded;
let those who wish me harm
be turned back and humiliated.
CSB17.3:
Let those who say, “Aha, aha!”
retreat because of their shame. ⓒ
CSB17.4:
Let all who seek you rejoice and be glad in you;
let those who love your salvation
continually say, “God is great!” ⓓ
CSB17.5:
I am oppressed and needy;
hurry to me, God.
You are my help and my deliverer;
LORD, do not delay. ⓔ

AMP.1:
To the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David, to bring to remembrance. O God, come quickly to save me;
O LORD, come quickly to help me!
AMP.2:
Let those be ashamed and humiliated
Who seek my life;
Let them be turned back and humiliated
Who delight in my hurt.
AMP.3:
Let them be turned back because of their shame and disgrace
Who say, "Aha, aha!"
AMP.4:
May all those who seek You [as life's first priority] rejoice and be glad in You;
May those who love Your salvation say continually,
"Let God be magnified!"
AMP.5:
But I am afflicted and needy;
Come quickly to me, O God!
You are my help and my rescuer;
O LORD, do not delay.

MSG.1:
A David prayer
God! Please hurry to my rescue!
God, come quickly to my side!
MSG.2:
Those who are out to get me—
let them fall all over themselves.
Those who relish my downfall—
send them down a blind alley.
MSG.3:
Give them a taste of their own medicine,
those gossips off clucking their tongues.
MSG.4:
Let those on the hunt for you
sing and celebrate.
Let all who love your saving way
say over and over, "God is mighty!"
MSG.5:
But I've lost it. I'm wasted.
God—quickly, quickly!
Quick to my side, quick to my rescue!
God, don't lose a minute.

NIV.1:
Psalm 70
For the director of music. Of David. A petition.
Hasten, O God, to save me;
O Lord, come quickly to help me.
NIV.2:
May those who seek my life
be put to shame and confusion;
may all who desire my ruin
be turned back in disgrace.
NIV.3:
May those who say to me, “Aha! Aha!”
turn back because of their shame.
NIV.4:
But may all who seek you
rejoice and be glad in you;
may those who love your salvation always say,
“Let God be exalted!”
NIV.5:
Yet I am poor and needy;
come quickly to me, O God.
You are my help and my deliverer;
O Lord, do not delay.

NRSVCE.1:
Be pleased, O God, to deliver me.
O LORD, make haste to help me!
NRSVCE.2:
Let those be put to shame and confusion
who seek my life.
Let those be turned back and brought to dishonor
who desire to hurt me.
NRSVCE.3:
Let those who say, “Aha, Aha!”
turn back because of their shame.
NRSVCE.4:
Let all who seek you
rejoice and be glad in you.
Let those who love your salvation
say evermore, “God is great!”
NRSVCE.5:
But I am poor and needy;
hasten to me, O God!
You are my help and my deliverer;
O LORD, do not delay!

NET.1: O God, please be willing to rescue me! O LORD, hurry and help me!
NET.2: May those who are trying to take my life be embarrassed and ashamed! May those who want to harm me be turned back and ashamed!
NET.3: May those who say, “Aha! Aha!” be driven back and disgraced!
NET.4: May all those who seek you be happy and rejoice in you! May those who love to experience your deliverance say continually, “May God be praised!”
NET.5: I am oppressed and needy! O God, hurry to me! You are my helper and my deliverer! O LORD, do not delay!
